ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" INTEGER /* Region the state belongs to (e.g., 1-4) */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "state_area" REAL /* Total area of the state in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the indicator belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the economic indicators are valid */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "methodology_id" INTEGER /* ID of the methodology used */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  "scs134" REAL /* Value of the scs134 indicator */,
  "scs155" REAL /* Value of the scs155 indicator */,
  "crc402" REAL /* Value of the crc402 indicator */,
  "jbs170" REAL /* Value of the jbs170 indicator */,
  "pvs501" REAL /* Value of the pvs501 indicator */,
  "dms451" REAL /* Value of the dms451 indicator */,
  "scs142" REAL /* Value of the scs142 indicator */,
  "hts384" REAL /* Value of the hts384 indicator */,
  "dms439" REAL /* Value of the dms439 indicator */,
  "dms240" REAL /* Value of the dms240 indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_methodology_id FOREIGN KEY ("methodology_id") REFERENCES methodologies ("methodology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator (e.g., scs134) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data point */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the demographic data is valid */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "methodology_id" INTEGER /* ID of the methodology used */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density of the state */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the state's population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_methodology_id FOREIGN KEY ("methodology_id") REFERENCES methodologies ("methodology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source's website or documentation */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methodologies" (
  "methodology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each methodology */,
  "methodology_name" TEXT /* Name of the methodology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the methodology */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the methodology documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("methodology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to verify file integrity */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version associated with the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of changes in the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
